name: convert_markdown_to_pdf
description: Convert Markdown content to a PDF document. Gotenberg renders Markdown within an HTML wrapper template using Chromium. You must provide both an 'index.html' file (the HTML wrapper that includes a Go template variable {{ toHTML .DirPath "file.md" }} where the Markdown will be inserted) and one or more '.md' Markdown files. This allows you to control the styling and layout of the Markdown rendering via the HTML wrapper.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Must include an 'index.html' wrapper template and one or more '.md' Markdown files. The HTML wrapper uses Go template syntax: {{ toHTML .DirPath "content.md" }} to embed the rendered Markdown. Sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: paperWidth
parameters.description: Paper width in inches. Default is '8.5'.

parameters.name: paperHeight
parameters.description: Paper height in inches. Default is '11'.

parameters.name: marginTop
parameters.description: Top margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginBottom
parameters.description: Bottom margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginLeft
parameters.description: Left margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginRight
parameters.description: Right margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: landscape
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for landscape orientation. Default is 'false'.

files.index.html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><style>body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; } h1 { color: #2c3e50; } code { background: #f4f4f4; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; }</style></head><body>{{ toHTML .DirPath "content.md" }}</body></html>
files.content.md:
# Project Report

## Summary

This report covers the Q4 deliverables.

### Key Metrics

- Revenue: $1.2M
- Users: 45,000
- Uptime: 99.9%

## Conclusion

All targets were met successfully.
